smapsActiveEntity.msgText: 021511Z MAY 26 HYDROLANT 873/26. IRISH SEA. ENGLAND. 1. UNDERWATER OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE BY M/V ZWERVER AND CABLESHIP NDEAVOR IN AREA BOUND BY 53-35.50N 003-35.80W, 53-35.50N 003-26.80W, 53-29.50N 003-34.20W, 53-29.50N 003-35.80W. WIDE BERTH REQUESTED. 2. CANCEL HYDROLANT 834/26.

020011Z MAY 26 HYDROLANT 869/26. SOUTH ATLANTIC. BRAZIL. 1. UNDERWATER OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS UNTIL 110300Z MAY BY M/V SISTAC VITORIA IN 22-22.48S 040-25.05W. WIDE BERTH REQUESTED. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 110400Z MAY 26.

011823Z MAY 26 HYDROLANT 866/26. MARITIME CONTENT DISSEMINATION PORTAL (MCDP) ADVISORY NGA IS AWARE OF AN ISSUE RESULTING IN A LOGIN LOOP FOR SOME USERS ATTEMPTING TO ACCESS NGA???S MARITIME CONTENT DISSEMINATION PORTAL (HTTPS://MARITIME.GEO.NGA.MIL). NGA IS INVESTIGATING FURTHER. AT THIS TIME, IMPACTED USERS SHOULD ENSURE THEIR EMAIL ADDRESS HAS BEEN ADDED TO THEIR GEOAXIS PROFILE AT HTTPS://PORTAL.GEOAXIS.GS.MIL/USER. USERS ARE ALSO ADVISED TO CLEAR THEIR WEB BROWSER CACHE AND TRY ANOTHER WEB BROWSER. ESYNC (HTTPS://ESYNC.NGA.MIL) REMAINS FULLY AVAILABLE AND CAN BE USED TO UPDATE CHARTS AND ENC REGIONS PREVIOUSLY RECEIVED FROM NGA. IF YOU REQUIRE FURTHER ASSISTANCE, INCLUDING REQUESTS FOR DIRECT DOWNLOADS VIA DOD SAFE, PLEASE CONTACT MARHELP@NGA.MIL.

311429Z JUL 25 HYDROLANT 1273/25(24). SOUTH ATLANTIC. DNC 01. ODAS BUOY ESTABLISHED IN 25-33.58S 044-03.17W.

171751Z JUL 25 HYDROLANT 1204/25. CANCELLED ELECTRONIC NAVIGATIONAL CHART (ENC) ADVISORY. USERS OF NGA ENC PRODUCTS ARE ADVISED OF POTENTIAL UNINTENDED ECDIS BEHAVIOR WHEN PROCESSING CANCELLED CHARTS, INCLUDING REINSTALLATION OF RECENTLY CANCELLED CHARTS ON SOME SYSTEMS WITHOUT OBVIOUS ERROR OR WARNING MESSAGES. NGA HAS CONFIRMED THIS ISSUE AFFECTS NAVY VMS 9.5 AND RAYTHEON ANSCHUTZ SYNAPSIS NX SYSTEMS. THIS ISSUE DOES NOT AFFECT NAVY ECDIS. OTHER SYSTEMS ARE CURRENTLY UNASSESSED. USERS MAY REFERENCE NGAS ENC CATALOG (GLOBAL OR REGIONAL PRODUCT LISTINGS) FOR A LIST OF CANCELLED CHARTS WHICH SHOULD BE UNINSTALLED FROM ECDIS. NGAS GLOBAL ENC CATALOG IS AVAILABLE ON HTTPS://MCDP.NGA.MIL, WITH REGIONAL ENC PRODUCT LISTING SPREADSHEETS CONTAINED WITHIN EACH REGIONS ZIP ON ESYNC, NGAS WEBSITES, AND WORLDCOVER DVD. USERS MAY FILTER PRODUCT LISTINGS FOR EDITION OF CXL AND SORT BY ISSUE DATE TO SEE MOST RECENT CANCELLATIONS. CHARTS CANCELLED WITHIN THE LAST 90 DAYS ARE ACTIVELY DISSEMINATED BY NGA AND MOST LIKELY CANDIDATES FOR INADVERTENT REINSTALLATION. NGA IS CONSULTING WITH THE USER COMMUNITY TO ASSESS POSSIBLE CHANGES TO THE CANCELLED CHART DISSEMINATION PROCESS TO MITIGATE THIS POTENTIAL UNINTENDED ECDIS BEHAVIOR.
310202Z MAY 25 HYDROLANT 915/25(24). WESTERN SOUTH ATLANTIC. DNC 01. 1. 18.3 METER DEPTH REPORTED IN 20-35.71S 034-46.07W. 2. CANCEL HYDROLANT 580/25.

281512Z FEB 25 HYDROLANT 361/25(55). BLACK SEA. DNC 10. 1. MINES ADRIFT REPORTED IN NORTHWESTERN, WESTERN AND SOUTHWESTERN BLACK SEA. VESSELS IN VICINITY ARE ADVISED TO EXERCISE EXTREME CAUTION. 2. CANCEL HYDROLANT 789/22.

170957Z JAN 25 HYDROLANT 87/25(GEN). EASTERN SOUTH ATLANTIC. SOUTHWESTERN INDIAN OCEAN. SOUTH AFRICA. DNC 01. CAPE TOWN RADIO E-MAIL UNUSABLE UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE. FOR ASSISTANCE CONTACT NAVAREA VII, E-MAIL: MARITIMERADIO@TELKOM.CO.ZA, MARITIMERADIO@GMAIL.COM.

071356Z NOV 24 HYDROLANT 2306/24(56). EASTERN MEDITERRANEAN SEA. CYPRUS. DNC 10. ODAS BUOY 33-33.41N 031-55.09E REPORTED MISSING.

301508Z SEP 24 HYDROLANT 2088/24(55). BLACK SEA. ROMANIA. DNC 10. 1. DUE TO THE PRESENCE OF MINES, ALL VESSELS APPROACHING AND DEPARTING ROMANIAN PORTS ARE ENCOURAGED TO USE THE FOLLOWING RECOMMNEDED TRACKS: A. PORT OF MANGALIA ALONG TRACKLINE JOINING 43-47.59N 028-50.86E, 43-47.50N 028-37.61E. B. PORT OF NAVODARI ALONG TRAKLINE JOINING 43-47.59N 028-50.86E, 44-11.33N 028-50.86E, 44-15.52N 028-45.04E. C. ENTRANCE TO PORT OF CONSTANTA TRAFFIC SEPERATION SCHEME ALONG TRACKLINE JOINING 43-47.59N 028-50.86E, 43-58.79N 028-50.86E. D. EXIT FROM PORT OF CONSTANTA TRAFFIC SEPERATION SCHEME ALONG TRACKLINE JOINING 43-56.75N 028-50.86E, 43-47.59N 028-50.86E. E. PORT OF SULINA ALONG TRACKLINE JOINING 43-47.59N 028-50.86E, 44-00.57N 028-50.87E, 44-26.93N 029-43.20E, 44-36.49N 029-52.56E, 45-05.89N 029-52.56E, 45-08.04N 029-47.58E. 2. VESSELS ARE REQUESTED TO IMMEDIATELY REPORT SIGHTINGS OF MINES OR MINE-LIKE OBJECTS TO: A. ROMANIAN MARITIME HYDROGRAPHIC DIRECTORATE, PHONE: 402 4165 1040, EMAIL: NTM@DHMFN.RO. B. MRCC CONSTANTA, PHONE: 402 4161 5949, EMAIL: MRCC@RNA.RO. C. ROMANIAN COAST GUARD, PHONE: 424 164 1188, EMAIL: SCOMAR@MAI.GOV.RO.
161213Z SEP 24 HYDROLANT 2005/24(55). BLACK SEA. ROMANIA. DNC 10. FOG SIGNAL AT CONSTANTA OUTER HARBOR LIGHT 44-08.61N 028-40.37E INOPERATIVE.

021532Z APR 24 HYDROLANT 682/24(55). BLACK SEA. UKRAINE. DNC 10. 1. UKRAINIAN COASTAL WARNING COORDINATOR HAS DECLARED THE FOLLOWING COASTAL APROACH INSTRUCTIONS FOR ENTRY OR DEPARTURE IN UKRAINIAN PORTS 0200Z TO 1700Z DAILY UNTIL FUTHER NOTICE. 2. ROUTES TO THE PORTS OF UKRAINE: A. ROUTE FOR VESSELS WITH A DRAFT OF UP TO EIGHT METERS WITHIN THREE MILES OF TRACKLINE JOINING 45-05.00N 030-03.00E, 45-14.00N 030-01.00E, 45-39.00N 030-05.70E, 45-47.80N 030-22.70E. B. ROUTE FOR VESSELS WITH A DRAFT OF UP TO EIGHT METERS WITHIN ONE MILE OF TRACKLINE JOINING 45-47.80N 030-22.70E, 45-58.86N 030-30.79E, 46-03.40N 030-32.60E, 46-10.81N 030-40.84E, 46-19.84N 030-48.00E, 46-25.38N 030-53.23E. C. TWO-WAY ROUTE FOR VESSELS WITH DRAFT UP TO 12 METERS WITHIN THREE MILES OF TRACKLINE JOINING 45-05.00N 030-03.00E, 45-14.00N 030-01.00E, 45-39.00N 030-05.70E, 46-00.00N 030-57.80E, 46-02.80N 031-04.40E, 46-19.30N 031-04.40E, 46-26.30N 030-53.90E. D. TWO-WAY ROUTE FOR VESSELS OVER 12 METERS DRAFT WITHIN THREE MILES OF TRACKLINE JOINING 45-03.90N 030-18.50E, 45-33.80N 030-36.90E, 46-00.00N 030-57.80E, 46-02.80N 031-04.40E, 46-19.30N 031-04.40E, 46-26.30N 030-53.90E. E. SOUTHERN TEMPORARY WAITING AREA FOR VESSELS GOING TO THE PORTS OF CHORNOMORSK, ODESA, OR PIVDENNYI MAY BE USED TO WAIT FOR TRANSITING THE ROUTES DURING ALLOWED TIMES IN AREA BOUND BY 45-00.00N 030-10.00E, 44-55.00N 030-25.00E, 44-50.00N 030-25.00E, 44-50.00N 030-10.00E. F. NORTHERN HOLDING AREA AR 354 USED FOR SHORT STAYING VESSELS IN EMERGENCY CASES IN AREA BOUND BY 46-29.98N 030-50.37E, 46-30.48N 030-53.90E, 46-25.38N 030-53.90E, 46-25.38N 030-52.60E. G. CHORNOMORSK TO NORTHERN HOLDING AREA CHANNEL WITHIN 200 METERS OF TRACKLINE JOINING 46-25.38N 030-52.60E, 46-22.00N 030-47.70E, 46-21.55N 030-46.29E, 46-20.00N 030-42.70E, 46-18.84N 030-41.81E, 46-19.12N 030-40.60E. H. ODESA TO NORTHERN HOLDING AREA CHANNEL WITHIN 200 METERS OF TRACKLINE JOINING 46-30.00N 030-50.51E, 46-30.00N 030-46.40E, 46-29.90N 030-46.04E, 46-29.99N 030-44.54E. I. PIVDENNYI TO NORTHERN HOLDING AREA CHANNEL WITHIN 200 METERS OF TRACKLINE JOINING 46-30.48N 030-53.90E, 46-31.84N 030-53.90E, 46-33.36N 031-00.06E, 46-36.19N 031-01.00E. 3. CANCEL HYDROLANT 603/23.
071540Z SEP 23 HYDROLANT 2017/23(55). BLACK SEA. ROMANIA. DNC 10. MINES REPORTED IN AREA WITHIN FIVE MILES OF 45-07.10N 030-09.70E.

MSGID/GENADMIN/NGA NAVSAFETY WASHINGTON DC// RMKS/ HYDROLANT 838/22(55). BLACK SEA. UKRAINE. DNC 10. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE IN AREA BOUND BY 45-05N 033-33E, 45-59N 033-51E, 47-00N 031-43E, 46-19N 029-55E, 45-05N 029-17E. 2. CANCEL HYDROLANT 814/22.
